name: materials-skills
description: Full-cycle materials science and engineering research skills for literature pipelines, writing, figures, data, PPTX, citations, and reviewer responses.

interface.shortDescription: Traceable materials research workflows from literature to papers.
interface.longDescription: Use Materials Science Skills to run routed materials research workflows across literature discovery pipelines, citation screening, reader packages, DOE planning, FAIR data organization, figure packages, manuscript drafting, English polishing, reviewer simulation, reviewer responses, and PPTX generation.
defaultPrompt: Help me run a WER-EA mini-review workflow from screening to figure planning.
Set up a weekly literature pipeline for my materials topic with candidate scoring.
Audit this experimental manuscript for evidence gaps before I draft the discussion.
Turn this paper package into a journal-club slide outline and then a real PPTX.
